title: Flowering Vines
body: # Flowering Vines Ever want Pretty vines that aren't just flat images, then these texture are for you. Adds 4 new flowering vine texture to the original vine and they are randomized frome the blockstate for growth or placing. _**May cause FPS drop in jungles depend of your computer specs.**_ **Work for 1.20 - 1.21** ### Before: ![Vanilla vine textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c152abc1a9f8ce345f3e1781c82c096b91f9873.png) ### After: ![Flowering vines with variation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce27453c5e5512a2bbcc8d36ca1ad57a46c73a7d.png)
